name: Dan Coats
summary: Former Director of National Intelligence who warned that Trump's alleged mishandling of classified documents could cost lives.

keyStatements.context: Warning about Trump's alleged possession of classified documents

timeline.event: Confirmed as Director of National Intelligence

timeline.significance: Warned about national security risks from Trump's behavior

credibility.background: Former U.S. Senator and Ambassador to Germany with extensive national security experience

oppositionReasons: Warned that mishandling classified documents could put lives at risk
Raised concerns about national security risks from classified documents

sources.title: Ex-Trump aide raises red flag on Donald's behavior: 'Lives could be lost'
